title: Security audit of trinity-server tools.rs
description: Perform a security audit of the agentic tool system in trinity-server/src/tools.rs. Check for: path traversal vulnerabilities in file operations, command injection in the shell tool, proper sandboxing boundaries, and error information leakage. Generate test cases for each vulnerability class found.
notes: Brakeman quest. Focus on the validate_path function, shell command blocklist, and file size limits. Generate regression tests.
